summary: No actionable ERROR entries found. Three unaddressed ERRORs in runner_status.json are non-actionable: V3-EXQ-449c and V3-EXQ-455a are intentional NotImplementedError stubs gated on upstream substrate work whose own gating experiments (V3-EXQ-476 / V3-EXQ-445d) FAILed; V3-EXQ-008 was already addressed by V3-EXQ-008r2/r3 successors using the legacy r-suffix naming convention (predates current alphabetic-suffix policy). All three already in review_tracker.discussed_experiment_dirs per the prior diagnose-errors session at 2026-04-27T05:20.

non_actionable_errors_audited.title: MECH-074b BLA retrieval bias on action selection -- V_s-gated
non_actionable_errors_audited.non_actionable_reason: Stub experiment that intentionally raises NotImplementedError until prerequisites land. Per its own error message it awaits (a) V3-EXQ-476 PASS, (b) V3-EXQ-445d PASS, and (c) MECH-074b hippocampal consumer wiring landed on SD-035. Status of gates: V3-EXQ-476 ERRORed and successors V3-EXQ-476a/b both FAILed (2026-04-24); V3-EXQ-445d ERRORed and successor V3-EXQ-445e FAILed (2026-04-23). The script cannot be re-implemented until upstream substrate work (MECH-269 V_s validation, MECH-284 Phase 3 consumer) provides a passing gate.
non_actionable_errors_audited.recommended_disposition: Leave in discussed_experiment_dirs. Re-queue only after MECH-269 V_s validation passes (currently being explored via MECH-269b in V3-EXQ-490a).

non_actionable_errors_audited.title: SD-032a salience coordinator behavioural -- V_s-enabled re-run
non_actionable_errors_audited.non_actionable_reason: Stub experiment that intentionally raises NotImplementedError. Per its own error message it awaits V3-EXQ-476 cascade gate PASS and MECH-284 Phase 3 consumer landing. Same upstream gate as V3-EXQ-449c.
non_actionable_errors_audited.recommended_disposition: Leave in discussed_experiment_dirs. Re-queue only after the V_s cascade gate passes.

non_actionable_errors_audited.title: SD-003 Larger World + 3x3 Observation
non_actionable_errors_audited.non_actionable_reason: Already addressed by successors V3-EXQ-008r2 (FAIL, 2026-03-17T18:37) and V3-EXQ-008r3 (FAIL, 2026-03-17T18:49). The legacy r-suffix naming convention predates the current alphabetic-suffix policy and is missed by a regex-based successor scan (^V3-EXQ-(\d+)([a-z]*)$ does not match 'r2'/'r3'). The scientific question (SD-003 self-attribution discriminability) was rolled into the V2 -> V3 transition roadmap and is otherwise carried by current SD-003 work.
non_actionable_errors_audited.recommended_disposition: Already in discussed_experiment_dirs (confirmed 2026-04-27T05:20 diagnose-errors session). No further action.
